title: Add inquiries & advertising contact section to the bottom of the Home page

requirements.text: Add a new final section at the very bottom of the Home page (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx), after all existing sections, that displays an inquiries/advertising contact callout matching the content shown in the provided image: "FOR INQUIRIES & ADVERTISING: aryananilshinde6122009@gmail.com".

quotes: Add this at last on the home page

acceptanceCriteria: The Home page contains a new last section rendered after the current final CTA section (or after the last section when authenticated).
The section includes the exact email text: aryananilshinde6122009@gmail.com.
The section uses English user-facing text and clearly labels the email as being for inquiries & advertising.

requirements.text: In the new Home page bottom section, render the email address as a clickable mailto link (mailto:aryananilshinde6122009@gmail.com) and provide a simple UI affordance to copy the email to clipboard.

quotes: Add this at last on the home page

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the email opens the user’s default mail client via a mailto link.
A copy action is available and copies "aryananilshinde6122009@gmail.com" to the clipboard.
Copy success/failure is communicated using the app’s existing toast/feedback patterns.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (shadcn components must be composed, not edited).
Do not change backend code; this change is Home page UI only.
Use English for all user-facing text.
nonGoals: Do not add or change authentication behavior.
Do not add a new backend endpoint or persistence for contact/inquiry messages.
